subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Verily the Most Great Ocean hath surged, and from every drop thereof is heard: "There is none other God but Him, the One" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قد ماج بحر الاعظم و یسمع من کل قطره منه انه لا اله الا هو الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
